description_long: This house is a modern, rectangular structure constructed primarily from repurposed shipping containers, featuring a flat roof with a perimeter railing that doubles as a rooftop terrace. The exterior is clad in dark metal panels, contrasted by light wooden decking that extends around the front and side, creating a spacious patio area. A prominent wooden staircase leads from the deck to the rooftop, while a pergola-style awning shades the main entrance and a large glass sliding door. On one side, a hanging chair adds a touch of leisure to the outdoor space, and large windows provide ample natural light to the interior. The house's design emphasizes clean lines, open outdoor living, and a minimalist aesthetic. The overall look is distinctly contemporary, with industrial and eco-friendly influences.
description: A modern, container-style house with a flat roof, dark metal exterior, large windows, and a spacious wooden deck with a rooftop terrace and outdoor staircase.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass doors, wooden deck, staircase to the roof, pergola awning, and a hanging chair.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the deck, the hanging chair, and the staircase leading up to the rooftop terrace.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a large picture window, the solid metal container wall, and the extension of the wooden deck.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the house, the rooftop terrace, and the wooden deck with the staircase visible at the far end.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a large glass sliding door under a wooden pergola awning, accessed via a wide wooden deck with steps.
